title: Steve Vs Alex
description: A fun and cursed mod made with steve and alex :)
body:
This minecraft mod add some vehicles and weapons made only with Steve or Alex just for fun :).

Current vehicles:

     - SteveCopter:
          Helicopter that shoots StevArrows

     - StevAne:
          Plane that drops StevOmbs

 

     - AlexCopter:
          Helicopter that shoots AlexArrows

     - AlexAne:
          Plane that drops AlexOmbs

Mod Spotlight: https://youtu.be/I6ZUTiLiTus (Ik the video it's a bit bad, i'm planning to make a better one with the release of the next version)

The plane movement and a part of the plane rendering code is a modified version of the one used on SimplePlanes mod.
